name: Razorpay Payment Gateway — Progressive Delivery
scenario: Razorpay is deploying a new payment tokenization algorithm. Too risky to roll out to all merchants at once. Implement blue-green for major DB-touching releases and canary for incremental algorithm changes, with automatic rollback on SLO breach.

core.description: k8s/blue-green/: payment-blue.yml + payment-green.yml (3 replicas each, labels {app: payment, version: blue/green}) + payment-service.yml (selector: version: blue).
k8s/canary/: payment-stable-ingress.yml + payment-canary-ingress.yml (canary: true, weight: 5). Two Deployments: payment-stable + payment-canary.
FeatureFlagService @Service: isNewTokenizationEnabled(userId) using userId.hashCode() % 100 < rolloutPercentage. @Value: feature.tokenization.enabled + rollout-percentage.
blue-green-deploy.sh: detect active version, deploy to inactive, smoke test, switch Service, with rollback on failure.
@SpringBootTest (3 tests): health returns UP, feature flag logic (100% rollout enables for all users), metrics counter registers. All 3 pass.
README: strategy selection guide (rolling vs canary vs blue-green) with one concrete example each.

bonus.description: CanaryMonitor @Service: @Scheduled(5min), queries Prometheus error rate, auto-rollback if > 2× SLO threshold. Test: threshold calculation correct.
Argo Rollout YAML: canary steps 5% → 25% → 50% → 100% with AnalysisTemplate checking error rate from Prometheus.
Expand-contract migration: Flyway V5__expand.sql (add new column, copy data) + PaymentEntity dual-read + V6__contract.sql (drop old column). Document all 4 phases.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. Blue-green Service switch: kubectl patch service payment-service -p '{"spec":{"selector":{"version":"green"}}}' — Service selector change is atomic (~1 second). Canary Nginx annotations: nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary: 'true' + nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-weight: '5' (string, not integer). userId.hashCode() % 100 for stable user bucketing — same user always gets same experience. Rollback canary: patch canary-weight annotation to '0'. Dual-read pattern: getPaymentRef() ?? getPaymentReference() during DB migration transition period.
